lex.bot.defaultconditionalbranch.CfnAbou: A set of actions that Amazon Lex should run if none of the other conditions are met.

lex.bot.defaultconditionalbranch.NextSte.Description: The next step in the conversation.

lex.bot.defaultconditionalbranch.Respons.Description: Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond the user input.
